properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6 v7 v3 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's me again, Lord, with a prayer I need an answer it's me again lord with a problem I cannot solve

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I don't mean to bother you there is something that I must do I need your help to go through it's me again lord, it's me again lord,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's me again, Lord, with a prayer. I need an answer, It's me again, Lord, with a problem, I cannot solve.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I don't mean to bother you there is something that I must do I need your help to go through It's me again, Lord, It's me again, Lord.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: it's me again lord with a pain I need your healing it's me again lord with a burden I cannot heal as I go from day to day keep me lord rest thine stray I need your help everyday It's me again, Lord, It's me again, Lord.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I don't mean to bother you there is something that I must do I need your help to go through It's me again, Lord, It's me again, Lord.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: it's me again lord with a door I cannot open its me again lord will you please open it for me There are hills That I have to climb In Your word Your help I find, I need Your help all the time It's me again, Lord, It's me again, Lord,

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I don′t need to bother You I got something that I must do I need Your help To go through I need Your help To go through I need Your help To go through It's me again, Lord, It′s me again, Lord.
